channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 17th March
item.description:
Please pass to AHR Please arrange visit. Issues with drainage and along this road. Can drainage be reviewed, along parts of road running water has caused a lot of issues.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 17th March

item.title: Pavement removed, 17th March
item.description:
Pavement surface removed to access water stopcock and has not been re-instated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 324, London Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Failed re-instatement, 17th March
item.description:
I believe the road was dug by city fibre continuing fibre across the road. The re-instatement is failing. When a bus or other large vehicle travels over the strip our property "JUMPS". This is very disturbing when you are inside the building. The movement is causing cracks in our building.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Saint Georges Place, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
